title: erodium carvifolium subsp. castellanum
intro: Erodium carvifolium subsp. castellanum, also known as Castilian geranium, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant's health benefits include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are said to aid in wound healing, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Castilian geranium typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's roots and leaves, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or topical applications.
